items.title: Arcane Jaspr
items.description: A Flutter-like UI component library for Dart web applications
items.content: Arcane Jaspr A Flutter-like component library that brings type-safe, enumerated styling to Dart web development. Write familiar code, get semantic HTML + CSS. The Abstraction Journey Web development in Dart has historically meant choosing between Flutter Web's poor SEO or wrestling with raw HTML strings. Arcane Jaspr offers a third path: Flutter-like ergonomics with native web output. Level 0: Raw HTML + CSS The traditional approach. Verbose, error-prone, no IDE support: $1 No autocomplete, typo

items.title: Introduction
items.description: A Flutter-like UI component library for Dart web applications
items.content: Introduction Arcane Jaspr brings Flutter-like ergonomics to Dart web development. Write familiar component code, get semantic HTML + CSS. The Abstraction Journey Web development in Dart has historically meant choosing between Flutter Web's poor SEO or wrestling with raw HTML strings. Arcane Jaspr offers a third path. Level 0: Raw HTML + CSS The traditional approach. Verbose, error-prone, no IDE support: $1 No autocomplete, typos become runtime bugs, copy-paste styling, no theming. Level 1: Jaspr

items.title: Why Jaspr?
items.description: When to choose Jaspr over Flutter for web development
items.content: Why Jaspr + Arcane Jaspr? This guide helps you understand when Jaspr is the right choice for your web project, especially compared to Flutter web. The Core Difference $1 renders your UI to a canvas element. The browser sees a single tag, not your buttons, text, or links. $1 renders to semantic HTML. Your button is a , your text is a , your link is an . The browser understands your content. This fundamental difference affects everything. --- SEO and Discoverability Search Engine Indexing | Aspect
